info.title: AI Readiness Score API
info.description: API to get AI readiness scores for products

get.summary: Get AI readiness score for products
get.description: Search for products and return AI readiness scores based on user type

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Product name to search for (e.g., 'recliner sofa', 'smartphone')

parameters.name: user_type
parameters.description: Type of user - customer (wants high-quality products) or retailer (wants improvement opportunities)

response.description: Natural language response with product recommendations
